_comment: CPIC-style Warfarin dose sensitivity (CYP2C9 + VKORC1). Simplified MVP; consult CPIC guideline for full tables.
CYP2C9 *1/*3 + VKORC1 GA: High bleeding risk — lower starting dose
CYP2C9 *1/*1 + VKORC1 Unknown: Standard dosing expected (CYP2C9 normal); VKORC1 genotype unknown — recommend testing
CYP2C9 *1/*2 + VKORC1 Unknown: Reduced CYP2C9 function — consider lower starting dose; VKORC1 unknown — recommend testing
CYP2C9 *1/*3 + VKORC1 Unknown: Reduced CYP2C9 function — use lower starting dose; VKORC1 unknown — recommend testing
CYP2C9 *2/*2 + VKORC1 Unknown: Poor CYP2C9 function — significantly reduce dose; VKORC1 unknown — recommend testing
CYP2C9 *2/*3 + VKORC1 Unknown: Poor CYP2C9 function — significantly reduce dose; VKORC1 unknown — recommend testing
CYP2C9 *3/*3 + VKORC1 Unknown: Poor CYP2C9 function — avoid standard dosing; VKORC1 unknown — recommend testing
